title: prunella × bicolor
intro: Prunella × bicolor, also known as Self-heal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is a hybrid of Prunella grandiflora and Prunella vulgaris. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Prunella × bicolor include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Prunella × bicolor can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to promote healing and prevent infection.
